recommendations.title: The Prime of Miss Jean Brodie
recommendations.overview: A headstrong young teacher in a private school in 1930s Edinburgh ignores the curriculum and influences her impressionable 12-year-old charges with her over-romanticized worldview.

recommendations.title: The Poseidon Adventure
recommendations.overview: When their ocean liner capsizes, a group of passengers struggle to survive and escape.

recommendations.title: Scrooge
recommendations.overview: A musical adaptation of Charles Dickens' classic ghost tale starring Albert Finney.

recommendations.title: Reservoir Dogs

recommendations.title: Above the Shadows
recommendations.overview: A young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible must find her way back with the help of the one man who can see her.

recommendations.title: Argo
recommendations.overview: As the Iranian revolution reaches a boiling point, a CIA 'exfiltration' specialist concocts a risky plan to free six Americans who have found shelter at the home of the Canadian ambassador.
